case_title: RELIANCE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. HERTZ et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST AARON R. FELDMAN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-22-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-06-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CARLITO MANDIA. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-08-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-15-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELIANCE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ PENG, GOH YEE DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-15-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-31-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
